summaryEn: IRAN OPENS HORMUZ—FIRST WESTERN SHIP PASSES Iran has allowed a French container ship to cross the Strait of Hormuz after over a month stuck in the Gulf. The vessel is among a small group of Western ships approved, as more than 1,000 vessels remain waiting, with crossings tightly controlled via an IRGC-monitored route.
